First post — what this site is about

March 15, 2026

I’ve been meaning to do this for a while.

This site is my space to think out loud — about product management, leadership, building teams, and the messy, interesting work of figuring out what to build and why.

I’m not doing this to build an audience. I’m doing it because writing forces clarity, and clarity is most of the job.

If you find something useful here, great. If not, at least I’ll have thought through it.

More soon.
